system.description: You can also get a nasty, nasty high-intensity BrightLight flash system. Brights come in two intensities; the first is reusable and works just like a flash-pak. The second is a one-shot deal until the flash units are replaced; this puppy creates a flash bright enough to overload the optic nerves of the poor bastard in front of you, blinding and stunning him at the same time.
